obtain ⟨w, rfl⟩ := Submodule.mkQ_surjective _ v
  induction w using DirectSum.induction_on with
  | H_zero => exact ⟨0, by simp⟩
  | H_basic p u =>
    use fderiv ℝ (fun t ↦ p.1.2 t - x) 0 u
    have hp := p.2.1
    rw [IsFineDiffeology.isPlot_iff] at hp
    have hq : ContDiff ℝ ⊤ fun t ↦ p.1.2 t - x := hp.sub contDiff_const
    have h0 : (fun t ↦ p.1.2 t - x) 0 = 0 := by simp [p.2.2]
    convert (InternalTangentSpace.lof_comp_apply _ hq h0 u).symm using 1
    · congr 1; ext t; simp [add_comm]
    · simp [p.2.2]
  | H_add x y hx hy =>
    obtain ⟨vx, hvx⟩ := hx
    obtain ⟨vy, hvy⟩ := hy
    exact ⟨vx + vy, by simp [map_add, hvx, hvy]⟩

induction v using Quotient.inductionOn' with
  | h v =>
    induction v using DirectSum.induction_on with
    | H_zero => exact ⟨0, by simp⟩
    | H_basic p w =>
      have hp := p.2.1
      rw [isPlot_iff_factorsSmooth] at hp
      obtain ⟨f, hf, hfp⟩ := hp
      use fderiv ℝ f 0 w
      rw [InternalTangentSpace.lof_comp_apply]
      · congr 1
        ext i : 1
        simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq, Sigma.mk.inj_iff]
        constructor
        · rfl
        · ext t
          simp [hfp, p.2.2]
      · exact hf
      · have : f 0 = 0 := by
          have h := congr_arg (· 0) hfp
          simp at h
          have h2 := p.2.2
          rw [h] at h2
          exact (add_left_eq_self.mp h2.symm).symm
        exact this
    | H_add u v hu hv =>
      obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hu
      obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := hv
      exact ⟨a + b, by simp [map_add, ha, hb]⟩
